segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Is it okay if I keep these suitcases here?

segments.speaker: Driver
segments.text: That's fine. Just don't block the aisle.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. How will I know when we get there?

segments.speaker: Driver
segments.text: There'll be an announcement, and a lot of people will get off there.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I just landed. I'm starting school here, so I'm still getting my bearings.

segments.speaker: Passenger
segments.text: Nice. South Station is pretty obvious.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. Thanks. I was trying not to overthink it.
